title: Global Cement Market Size To Worth USD 612.12 Billion By 2033 l CAGR Of 4.27%
author: Spherical Insights & Consulting
description: The global cement market is expected to grow from $402.89 billion in 2023 to $612.12 billion by 2033, driven by increasing infrastructure spending and urbanization, particularly in Asia-Pacific and the Middle East and Africa regions.
